allow: Bash(cmd /c "for /f tokens^=5 %p in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr LISTENING ^| findstr :3001''\) do taskkill /PID %p /F")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f tokens^=5 %p in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr LISTENING ^| findstr :5173''\) do taskkill /PID %p /F")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f tokens^=5 %p in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr LISTENING ^| findstr :5174''\) do taskkill /PID %p /F")

Bash(powershell -Command "$ports = @\(3001,5173,5174\); foreach \($port in $ports\) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pid_ = $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Host ""Killing PID $pid_ on port $port""; Stop-Process -Id $pid_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); logic=data.get\(''''logic'''',[]\); [print\(json.dumps\(n, indent=2\)[:200]\) for n in logic[:3]]")
